tools.name: analyze_current_file
tools.description: Analyze the current file for imports, class structure, and controller methods.

tools.name: analyze_legacy_project_baseline
tools.description: Build a technical baseline for legacy projects to guide high-quality AI integration with minimal context waste.

tools.name: analyze_odata_metadata
tools.description: Analyze OData V2/V4 metadata from XML, file, URL, or service root and return entities, properties, navigation, and operations.

tools.name: analyze_ui5_performance
tools.description: Analyze UI5 XML/JS files with performance-focused rules and actionable recommendations.

tools.name: analyze_ui5_project
tools.description: Analyze SAPUI5 project configuration from ui5.yaml, manifest.json, and package.json.

tools.name: apply_agent_pack
tools.description: Apply a saved agent pack to the current project with fingerprint verification and scaffolded materialization.

tools.name: apply_project_patch
tools.description: Apply one or more safe workspace file changes and create rollback metadata for later restore.

tools.name: audit_project_mcp_state
tools.description: Audit MCP project artifacts/layout version and produce a migration plan to the current managed structure.

tools.name: build_ai_context_index
tools.description: Build a token-efficient, quality-aware context index for legacy projects to minimize redundant prompts.

tools.name: collect_legacy_project_intake
tools.description: Collect and persist legacy-project contextual intake to improve AI guidance quality while minimizing repeated prompts/tokens.

tools.name: ensure_project_mcp_current
tools.description: Automatically audit and upgrade MCP project artifacts to the current managed layout when needed.

tools.name: generate_javascript_function
tools.description: Generate an ES2022 JavaScript or TypeScript function with JSDoc for browser or Node runtime.

tools.name: generate_ui5_controller
tools.description: Generate a SAPUI5 controller skeleton with lifecycle hooks and JSDoc.

tools.name: generate_ui5_feature
tools.description: Generate an end-to-end UI5 feature scaffold (view/controller/fragment/routing/i18n) with dry-run support.

tools.name: generate_ui5_formatter
tools.description: Generate a formatter module that follows SAPUI5 module structure.

tools.name: generate_ui5_fragment
tools.description: Generate an XML SAPUI5 fragment skeleton with proper namespaces.

tools.name: generate_ui5_view_logic
tools.description: Generate UI5 view-controller event logic methods for XML views.

tools.name: lint_javascript_code
tools.description: Run ESLint-style static checks and return warnings plus suggested fixes.

tools.name: list_agent_packs
tools.description: List saved reusable agent packs from catalog.

tools.name: manage_ui5_i18n
tools.description: Extract UI literals, detect missing/unused i18n keys, and optionally apply fixes with safe preview/apply patch flow.

tools.name: materialize_recommended_agents
tools.description: Materialize recommended agents into project artifacts by generating blueprint/guide/prompt and optional MCP config.

tools.name: mcp_health_report
tools.description: Return MCP server/runtime health diagnostics (tool exposure, docs alignment, contract snapshot, and managed artifact status).

tools.name: prepare_legacy_project_for_ai
tools.description: Prepare a legacy/existing project for high-quality AI delivery by orchestrating ensure, intake, baseline, and context index steps.

tools.name: promote_agent_pack
tools.description: Promote/degrade pack lifecycle status (experimental/candidate/recommended/deprecated) using automatic rules over feedback metrics or manual override.

tools.name: rank_agent_packs
tools.description: Rank saved agent packs using execution feedback metrics to prioritize recommendations for the current context.

tools.name: rank_project_skills
tools.description: Rank project skills using local feedback metrics to prioritize reliable skills in future recommendations.

tools.name: read_project_file
tools.description: Read a workspace file safely with project-root sandboxing.

tools.name: recommend_project_agents
tools.description: Analyze project signals and recommend agent definitions with materialization-ready arguments.

tools.name: record_agent_execution_feedback
tools.description: Record agent execution feedback in local JSONL log and update aggregate pack metrics for future ranking and promotion.

tools.name: record_skill_execution_feedback
tools.description: Record structured execution feedback for project skills and update aggregate metrics for future ranking.

tools.name: refactor_javascript_code
tools.description: Refactor JavaScript code using modern syntax while preserving readability.

tools.name: refresh_project_context_docs
tools.description: Refresh docs/mcp context files incrementally using workspace snapshot diff with deterministic output.

tools.name: rollback_project_patch
tools.description: Rollback a previously applied patch using stored backup metadata.

tools.name: run_project_quality_gate
tools.description: Run consolidated quality gate for UI5 projects (version compatibility, security, performance, OData usage, and context docs freshness).

tools.name: save_agent_pack
tools.description: Save generated agent artifacts into a reusable pack catalog with strict validation and fingerprinting.

tools.name: scaffold_project_agents
tools.description: Scaffold reusable project agent artifacts (blueprint, guide, bootstrap prompt, optional MCP config) with dry-run and patch safety.

tools.name: scaffold_project_skills
tools.description: Scaffold and manage project skills catalog with official references, safe preview/apply flow, and growth-ready feedback artifacts.

tools.name: scaffold_ui5_odata_feature
tools.description: Generate a base UI5 OData feature scaffold (view/controller/manifest/i18n) from service metadata with dry-run safety.

tools.name: search_mdn
tools.description: Search MDN documentation for JavaScript and web platform references.

tools.name: search_project_files
tools.description: Search workspace files by text query with optional extension filtering.

tools.name: search_ui5_sdk
tools.description: Search official SAPUI5 SDK metadata and return API/topic summaries with examples.

tools.name: security_check_javascript
tools.description: Detect risky JavaScript patterns including eval, command injection, and prototype pollution.

tools.name: security_check_ui5_app
tools.description: Scan UI5 XML/JS sources for security risks (XSS, unsafe HTML injection, dynamic code execution, insecure redirects).

tools.name: sync_manifest_json
tools.description: Synchronize manifest.json models, routes, and targets with idempotent updates and optional dry-run.

tools.name: upgrade_project_mcp
tools.description: Upgrade MCP-managed project artifacts to the latest layout version with dry-run, preview, and rollback-safe patching.

tools.name: validate_project_agents
tools.description: Validate generated agent blueprint and guardrail artifacts for consistency, tool coverage, and MCP integration readiness.

tools.name: validate_project_skills
tools.description: Validate project skill catalog integrity, official references, and file layout consistency.

tools.name: validate_ui5_code
tools.description: Validate SAPUI5 code for sap.ui.define usage, dependency order, naming, and MVC separation.

tools.name: validate_ui5_odata_usage
tools.description: Validate UI5 OData usage across manifest, XML/JS bindings, model APIs, and optional metadata cross-checks.

tools.name: validate_ui5_version_compatibility
tools.description: Validate UI5 control/module compatibility against project version and recommend better-fit components (e.g. dedicated date controls).

tools.name: write_project_file_preview
tools.description: Preview a safe workspace file write with hashes, line summary, and textual diff preview.
